pr.title: Record: 11L Int6 QAT + SmearGate + OrthoInit + SWA + TTT (val_bpb=1.1478)

output.summary: 11-layer int6 QAT model blends SmearGate/BigramHash embedding, OrthoInit+muP, SWA, NTK-RoPE, and Muon+TTT tuning with sliding eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT performs extra SGD on the validation shard before final evaluation.
techniques: Int6 QAT with SmearGate/BigramHash token mixing and OrthoInit-scaled projections
Muon optimizer with SWA warmdown and NTK-RoPE positional encoding
Sliding-window eval plus TTT refinement on val data with FP16 embeddings and zstd compression
